classification.summary: Redesign of Daniells Auto Care website with a premium dark glassmorphism hero, retaining factual content and brand colors (#E80505 red, #0A0A0A near-black). The stack is Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind with shadcn-style, framer-motion, and lucide-react, deployed on Vercel. The scope includes a full site with dynamic service and service-area templates, curated Unsplash placeholders, and a budget gate of $8.
